subcodes.first_line: O handmaid of the Blessed Beauty! Ancient Balqís possessed a throne and crown of lustrous gold and beauteous gems [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای کنیز مبارک بهاء الله بلقیس قدیمرا تخت و تاجی از طلای قشنگ و سنگ خوشرنگ بود
subcodes.subjects: @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @the power of words; of speech, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
